title: Article Summary
scenario: Summarize a news article about a recent scientific breakthrough. The output should be a concise summary of 5-7 sentences that includes the breakthrough's name, key findings, and impact on society, and use a neutral tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the summary includes the breakthrough's name.
Check if the summary includes the breakthrough's key findings.
Verify if the summary includes the breakthrough's impact on society.
